entity.summary: Decentralized cryptocurrency exchange associated with the deex.exchange domain and the DEEX token ecosystem. Exchange-tracker sources describe DEEX as established around 2018. CoinGecko later showed zero coins, zero trading pairs, and zero reported 24h volume, while Cryptowisser marked Deex.Exchange dead in December 2022 after stating that financial issues prevented the platform from becoming fully operational and resulted in closure.
entity.notes: HEI uses death_reason unknown because available secondary sources mention financial issues and closure but do not establish a formal insolvency, hack, regulation, acquisition, rebrand, or voluntary_shutdown category. country_or_origin follows CoinGecko's Russia incorporation/address signal and should be treated as secondary-source based.

evidence.title: DEEX Statistics: Markets, Trading Volume & Trust Score
evidence.notes: Exchange profile identifies DEEX as a decentralized exchange established in 2018 and preserves the deex.exchange domain and Russia location signal.

evidence.title: Deex.Exchange review and inactive update
evidence.notes: Secondary dead-side source states that financial issues prevented full operation and resulted in closure. HEI retains unknown rather than asserting formal insolvency from this source alone.
